creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks, I see the new edition. 

Is the first line still meaningful?

> # $FreeBSD: docs/README.TXT 117 2013-01-13 22:58:33Z gjb $

Also, I understand the mention of    /head    however, strictly speaking, as a _branch_ it's not present at e.g. <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/> so instead, maybe: 

    /main

Sorry – comment 0, and this comment, are from slightly rushed/incomplete readings of the page.
